title: Make generated gh shim independent of PATH
description: Generate the gh wrapper so GUI apps can run it even when gh-forgejo-shim is not discoverable through PATH, fixing Codex.app GitHub CLI unavailable detection.
close_reason: Generated gh wrapper now invokes gh_forgejo_shim via the install-time Python executable, so it works in GUI app environments with stripped PATH.

title: Fix pipx-installed CLI startup failure
description: After reinstalling this package with pipx install --force ., both gfj --help and gh-forgejo-shim doctor fail. Diagnose the installed console scripts and fix the package entry points or imports so pipx-installed commands start correctly.
close_reason: Could not reproduce after inspecting installed pipx scripts; refreshed the pipx install and reinstalled the managed gh shim with --force. gfj --help and gh-forgejo-shim doctor now pass.

title: Fix Codex GitHub CLI unavailable regression
description: Codex.app is reporting GitHub CLI Unavailable when using both Forgejo and GitHub repositories through gfj/gh-forgejo-shim. Diagnose whether the installed gfj version is current, reproduce the availability-detection failure, and update the shim or docs/tests so Codex can detect the CLI again.
close_reason: fixed Codex availability regression by routing Forgejo auth/API identity probes through the shim, installed 0.1.1 locally, and validated GitHub delegation still works

title: Handle missing Forgejo token on PR create
description: Codex.app gh pr create against git.dirtydishes.dev can reach the Forgejo API without an Authorization header and gets HTTP 401 token is required. Investigate token discovery for PR creation, make the failure actionable or restore token lookup, and add regression coverage for the behavior.
close_reason: Added host-specific auth guarding for Forgejo write commands, made doctor report missing tokens per configured host, documented the behavior, and validated with focused plus full unittest runs.

title: Make Codex app gh discovery durable
description: Codex.app is showing GitHub CLI unavailable across Forgejo and GitHub repositories. Investigate the gh wrapper and GUI discovery paths, then make the shim resilient so Codex can reliably find and run gh.
close_reason: Implemented durable Codex gh discovery repair, installed the updated shim locally, and validated GitHub plus Forgejo workflows.

title: Restore GitHub PR info passthrough
description: Codex.app currently shows PR info unavailable for GitHub repositories while Forgejo repositories still resolve PR info. Forgejo repositories such as IslandFlow also no longer expose clickable PR links in Codex.app. Investigate shim routing, delegation, and GitHub-shaped PR/repo JSON fields so native GitHub calls pass through and Forgejo PR responses keep usable URL metadata.
close_reason: Fixed GitHub host delegation and Forgejo PR URL template output; added regression tests and documentation.

title: Teach bootstrap to catch missing macOS GUI shim PATH
description: After reinstalling the shim with gfj bootstrap, Codex can still miss Forgejo PR status if the macOS launchd GUI PATH excludes ~/.local/bin. Bootstrap should report this gap and print the install-gui-path repair command instead of appearing fully successful.
close_reason: Bootstrap now checks macOS launchd GUI PATH, prints install-gui-path when Codex cannot see the shim, and has regression coverage.

title: Keep GitHub CLI discoverable after uninstalling shim
description: Uninstalling the Forgejo gh shim should not make Codex or other macOS GUI apps lose access to the real GitHub CLI. The uninstall flow needs to leave launchd PATH in a usable state and tests should cover the fallback.
close_reason: macOS uninstall now rewrites shim-owned GUI PATH helpers to a real GitHub CLI fallback, applies launchd PATH, and has regression coverage.

title: Catch stale Forgejo host allowlists in doctor
description: Codex.app PR creation in islandflow delegated to the real GitHub CLI because the checkout now detects as git.dirtydishes.dev while the shim config only allowlisted the old git.deltaisland.io host. Doctor reported ok because it only checked that some Forgejo host existed, not that the current repository host was allowlisted. Update diagnostics and coverage so stale per-repo allowlists are visible before PR creation fails.
close_reason: Repaired islandflow routing by allowlisting git.dirtydishes.dev locally, then added a repo-aware doctor check and tests so stale Forgejo host allowlists are reported with an exact repair command.

title: Reconcile divergent Beads Dolt remote history
description: bd dolt pull failed because local and remote Dolt histories had no common ancestor. Compare local and remote Beads data, choose the authoritative history, repair the remote, and verify pull/push work again.
close_reason: Repaired the divergent Dolt remote by confirming the remote was an empty initialized history, force-pushing the local authoritative Beads history, and verifying bd dolt pull plus a clean remote clone.

title: Fix desktop sidebar terminal store reference
description: Desktop launch reaches the UI shell but crashes in Sidebar because useTerminalStateStore is referenced without being defined. Investigate the missing store reference, fix the runtime crash, and validate the desktop/web build path enough to confirm the Sidebar renders again.
close_reason: Closed as misfiled: the reported Sidebar crash was in /Users/kell/dev/oss-playground/dirtycode, not this repository.

title: Fix Codex PR board compatibility for Forgejo shim
description: Codex.app probes gh pr list with GitHub-shaped PR board fields, including additions, deletions, mergeable, statusCheckRollup, and --state merged. The shim currently emits null/missing or non-GitHub-shaped values for some of these fields and rejects merged state, causing Codex to show pull request status unavailable after checking PR status. Normalize these fields and add minimal checks support so Codex can parse Forgejo PR status.
close_reason: fixed Codex.app PR board compatibility by normalizing PR board fields, accepting merged PR lists, and adding parse-safe pr checks output

title: Shim gh pr list and repo view for Forgejo repos
description: Codex.app reports GitHub CLI unavailable because gh pr list and gh repo view still fall through to stock gh in Forgejo-only repositories. Add supported shim behavior for those commands so local Forgejo PR metadata can be discovered through the gh-compatible wrapper.
close_reason: Added Forgejo-backed gh pr list and gh repo view routing, tests, docs, and refreshed the active pipx shim.

title: Fix Codex PR status detection for Forgejo shim
description: Codex.app still reports pull request status unavailable after detecting the shim. Investigate the gh pr status/view compatibility surface and make the Forgejo shim return the GitHub CLI-compatible output Codex expects.
close_reason: Fixed gh pr status JSON envelope compatibility for Codex.app PR detection.

title: Discover fj macOS auth config
description: Teach auth discovery to read forgejo-cli's macOS Application Support keys.json so GUI apps like Codex can find Forgejo tokens without inherited shell environment variables.
close_reason: Auth discovery now reads fj's macOS Application Support keys.json, allowing Codex.app to find Forgejo auth without inherited token env vars.

title: Build gh-forgejo-shim v1 package
description: Implement the initial stdlib-only Python CLI package, gh wrapper lifecycle, Forgejo PR routing, tests, docs, and turn documentation from the OSS project plan.
close_reason: Implemented the V1 package, CLI wrapper lifecycle, Forgejo PR routing, docs, tests, and turn documentation.

title: document codex trace adaptation workflow
description: Add a polished HTML testing guide that explains how to capture Codex gh/git traces, summarize them, and convert observed behavior into shim compatibility tests and fixes.
close_reason: Added docs/testing/codex-trace.html with the Codex trace capture, summary, git recorder, test conversion, and shim adaptation workflow.

title: Add opt-in trace record module
description: Implement the core stdlib-only trace record module and focused unit tests without wiring it into routing yet.
close_reason: Implemented trace module and focused unit tests.

title: Implement temporary git recorder core
description: Add an isolated stdlib-only git recorder wrapper helper that can create and remove a temporary wrapper for one Codex launch session without wiring it into the CLI yet.
close_reason: Implemented the temporary git recorder core with stdlib-only wrapper generation, sanitized JSONL trace records, cleanup helper, and fake-git unit tests.

title: add codex probe capture and replay diagnostics
description: Implement opt-in tracing for gh/git probe behavior, summarize captured traces, add replay smoke checks, and validate compatibility with Codex-driven gh-forgejo-shim usage.
close_reason: Added opt-in gh trace capture, trace summaries, Codex smoke probes, temporary git recorder CLI/docs/tests, and consolidated turn documentation for probe-driven diagnostics.

title: Surface Forgejo PR URL for Codex.app
description: Codex.app is not seeing the Forgejo pull request link from the gh shim output. Diagnose the exact output contract Codex.app expects, add a red-capable regression test around the shimmed PR creation path, and update the implementation so the Forgejo PR URL is exposed in the right place.
close_reason: Default gh pr create output now includes a Codex.app-recognized marker while preserving Forgejo URLs and JSON output.

title: Make branch discovery and creation feel first class
description: Codex.app and similar GitHub-oriented GUIs can show incomplete branch lists or a disabled create-branch action until the branch picker is reopened. Investigate the local Git and gh-compatible surfaces these tools use, then add GitHub-shaped branch list/create compatibility where this shim can make Forgejo repositories behave more like GitHub.
close_reason: Added GitHub-shaped gh api branch/ref routing, Forgejo branch client methods, docs, tests, and turn documentation for first-class branch discovery and create-ref compatibility.

title: Refresh README for current shim capabilities
description: Update README.md so it reflects the current bootstrap, auth, GUI PATH, PR checks, issue, repo metadata, and rollback behavior.
close_reason: README now reflects the current bootstrap, auth, GUI PATH, PR checks, issue, repo metadata, config, rollback, and development behavior.

title: Add native Forgejo auth helpers
description: Implement auth login/import/status/logout commands so gh-forgejo-shim can store Forgejo tokens in user-local auth storage for Terminal and GUI-launched clients.
close_reason: Implemented native auth login/import/status/logout with validated shim-owned token storage, docs, tests, and turn documentation.

title: map forgejo ci status into github shaped checks
description: Translate Forgejo commit statuses into GitHub CLI-shaped PR status/check output so GitHub-oriented tools can read statusCheckRollup and gh pr checks for Forgejo repositories.
close_reason: Mapped Forgejo commit statuses into GitHub-shaped statusCheckRollup and gh pr checks output, with tests and documentation.

title: Broaden gh compatibility for probed commands
description: Add shim compatibility for additional gh commands commonly probed by developer tools: pr checks, pr diff, pr comment, pr checkout, issue list/view/create, and richer repo view JSON fields.
close_reason: Implemented Forgejo-backed gh compatibility for probed PR, issue, and repo view commands with tests and docs.

title: Add bootstrap command and gfj alias
description: Add a gh-forgejo-shim bootstrap command that diagnoses and repairs common setup gaps, add a shorter gfj console alias, and refresh README onboarding.
close_reason: implemented bootstrap command, gfj alias, README onboarding, tests, and turn documentation

title: Broaden README compatibility documentation beyond PRs
description: Update README.md so new users understand the full GitHub-style tool compatibility setup for Forgejo repositories, including repository discovery, origin/default-branch metadata, branch tracking, commit/push UI, repo metadata, and PR workflows. Keep the guidance general for Codex.app, T3 Code, and similar tools rather than PR-only or Codex-only.
close_reason: Broadened README.md to document GitHub-style tool compatibility beyond PR workflows, including repository state, default branch, upstream tracking, commit/push UI, repo metadata, GUI PATH, and auth discovery.

title: Document Codex origin remote requirements
description: Codex.app PR status probes expect common Git remote metadata. Document the setup new Forgejo users may need, including an origin remote alias, fetched origin refs, origin/HEAD, and branch tracking.
close_reason: Documented GitHub-style origin remote requirements for Forgejo checkouts in README.md.

title: Make GitHub CLI discovery robust for GUI-launched apps
description: Codex.app and similar GUI-launched tools can run with a minimal macOS PATH, causing gh-forgejo-shim integrations to report that GitHub CLI is unavailable even when Homebrew gh is installed. Add package-level discovery/fallback behavior and documentation so users do not need a local launchctl workaround.
close_reason: Added fallback GitHub CLI discovery, macOS GUI PATH install/uninstall commands, doctor checks, docs, tests, and turn documentation for GUI-launched app PATH failures.

title: Move Diffs SSR instruction to global AGENTS
description: The Diffs SSR requirement was added to this repository AGENTS.md, but it is a global documentation preference. Remove the repo-local rule, add it to the global Codex AGENTS.md, and update turn documentation accordingly.
close_reason: Moved the Diffs SSR requirement from repo-local AGENTS.md into the global Codex AGENTS.md and documented the change.

title: Relax shim PATH doctor check
description: Update doctor so it warns only when another gh executable resolves before the managed shim, instead of requiring ~/.local/bin to be the first PATH entry.
close_reason: Doctor now checks whether the managed shim is the first gh executable in PATH instead of requiring its directory to be first.

title: Add developer testing guide
description: Document the recommended testing workflow for gh-forgejo-shim developers, including fast source-based checks, installed-wrapper checks, pipx reinstall guidance, and Codex.app GUI validation.
close_reason: Added docs/dev/testing.html with the recommended source, installed-wrapper, and Codex.app testing workflows for developers.

title: Refresh Beads README for current project state
description: Update .beads/README.md so it reflects how this repository currently uses Beads, including recently completed gh-forgejo-shim additions and remaining tracker workflow guidance.
close_reason: Updated .beads/README.md with current project-specific Beads workflow, recent shipped capabilities, remaining open issues, and session close guidance.

title: Implement real filters for shimmed gh pr list search flags
description: gh pr list now accepts author, label, assignee, app, and search flags to avoid falling through or failing early, but those filters are not yet applied to Forgejo API results. Add real filtering or explicit unsupported-flag behavior once the needed Forgejo API semantics are confirmed.

title: Add live Forgejo integration coverage
description: Add an integration test path that exercises Forgejo-compatible REST responses through a local HTTP fixture or disposable Forgejo test instance, so API behavior is validated beyond unit-level fakes.

title: Add package release automation
description: Add CI and release automation for building, checking, and publishing gh-forgejo-shim once the project is ready for PyPI distribution.
